first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10) in both evaluations, and the core reasoning is consistent. Both versions correctly identify the lack of C1 German proficiency as a "critical mismatch" and a knockout criterion for the role. The minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and concerns are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the change of university.
